robot_profile.name: single-camera-eef
robot_profile.description: Single RGB camera manipulator exposing an end-effector action bridge.
notes: Closest lightweight fit for OpenVLA-style single-image policies.

recommendations: Run the adapter behind a remote GPU server for robot-side ROS2 deployment.

results.local_runtime: disabled by default; enable_local=True in a dedicated GPU env

issues.message: adapter expects robot state; output quality or schema may be invalid without it
adapter outputs 'custom'; robot profile supports eef_delta, eef_pose, gripper
adapter expects action chunks but robot profile consumes single actions

recommendations: Provide proprioception in VLAObservation.state or ROS joint state inputs.
Add a robot-specific action bridge for the adapter action space.
Enable chunk scheduling or consume VLAActionChunk in the downstream bridge.
Run the adapter behind a remote GPU server for robot-side ROS2 deployment.

issues.message: adapter expects at least 2 camera stream(s); robot profile declares 1
adapter outputs 'custom'; robot profile supports eef_delta, eef_pose, gripper

recommendations: Add the required camera streams or remap the adapter image inputs.
Provide proprioception in VLAObservation.state or ROS joint state inputs.
Add a robot-specific action bridge for the adapter action space.
Run the adapter behind a remote GPU server for robot-side ROS2 deployment.
